---
title: "Website"
author: "Margherita"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 200px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 400px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    theme:
      light: minty
      dark: superhero
self-contained: true 
lang: it
bibliography: biblio.bib
reference-location: margin
citation-location: margin
---

# Presentation

This is Margherita's website [@ggplot]

And this is a Pizza

![a pizza](images/image.jpeg)


## Sub presentation

Sub section $X = V + E$


### Sub sub section

Another sub sub sub section

@eq-ctt shows the basic equation in classic test theory.

:::{.column-margin}

#### My paragraph

This is a paragraph

:::{.grid}

:::{.g-col-4}
This is my first column
:::

:::{.g-col-4}
This is my second column
:::

:::{.g-col-4}
This is my third column
:::

:::

![This is an image](images/image.jpeg)
